---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem applying or reverting the Search Gleam patch
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Windows version/build

Example: Windows 11 24H2, build 26100.x

## PowerShell version

Output of:

```powershell
$PSVersionTable
```

## Region code

Example: `HU`

## What happened?

Describe the issue.

## Status output

Output of:

```powershell
.\Enable-SearchGleamEEA.ps1 -Status -Region HU
```

## Did reboot-time replacement run?

- [ ] Direct replacement worked
- [ ] Reboot-time replacement was scheduled
- [ ] I rebooted after scheduling
- [ ] Not sure

## Screenshots/logs

Paste relevant logs here. Redact usernames/machine names if needed.
